name: Mason County Multi-Sport Complex
description: Mason County Multi-Sport Complex is a place to play pickleball in Point Pleasant, WV. There are 4 outdoor asphalt and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are not available.
open_play_schedule: Daily until 10:30 as lights automatically go out.

name: New Haven Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at New Haven Pickleball Courts in New Haven, WV! There are 2 outdoor asphalt and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights and wheelchair accessibility.
